mapper.select: SELECT G.GAME_ID, G.HOME_TM_ID, G.AWAY_TM_ID, G.SSNT_YR, G.GAME_DT, HT.TM_KR_NM AS HOME_TM_KR_NM, AT.TM_KR_NM AS AWAY_TM_KR_NM, G.GAME_STTS_CD, G.STDM_ID FROM GAME G JOIN TM HT ON HT.TM_ID = G.HOME_TM_ID JOIN TM AT ON AT.TM_ID = G.AWAY_TM_ID WHERE G.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND G.GAME_DT = #{gameDt} AND G.GAME_STTS_CD != '03' ORDER BY G.GAME_ID
SELECT L.PLR_ID, L.BAT_ORD, L.POSN_CD, P.PLR_NM, P.REPR_POSN_CD FROM TM_LINEUP L JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = L.PLR_ID WHERE L.TM_ID = #{tmId} AND P.PLR_STTS_CD = 'AT' ORDER BY L.BAT_ORD
SELECT R.PLR_ID, R.ROT_ORD, P.PLR_NM FROM TM_ROTATION R JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = R.PLR_ID WHERE R.TM_ID = #{tmId} AND P.PLR_STTS_CD = 'AT' ORDER BY R.ROT_ORD LIMIT 1
SELECT B.PLR_ID, B.BULLPEN_ROLE_CD, P.PLR_NM FROM TM_BULLPEN B JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = B.PLR_ID WHERE B.TM_ID = #{tmId} AND P.PLR_STTS_CD = 'AT'
SELECT CFG_VAL FROM GAME_CFG WHERE CFG_KEY = 'USER_TM_ID' LIMIT 1
SELECT B.WIN_BONUS FROM GAME_CFG C JOIN BRDCST_SPNSR B ON B.BRDCST_CD = C.CFG_VAL WHERE C.CFG_KEY = 'BRDCST_SPNSR' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SSNT_EVNT (SSNT_YR, EVNT_DT, TM_ID, PLR_ID, EVNT_TYPE_CD, EVNT_TTLT, EVNT_CNTS, RD_YN) VALUES
(#{e.ssntYr}, #{e.evntDt}, #{e.tmId}, #{e.plrId}, #{e.evntTypeCd}, #{e.evntTtlt}, #{e.evntCnts}, '0')
